data.label: Character Text Splitter
data.name: characterTextSplitter
data.description: splits only on one type of character (defaults to "\n\n").

inputParams.label: Chunk Size
inputParams.name: chunkSize
inputParams.description: Number of characters in each chunk. Default is 1000.

inputParams.label: Chunk Overlap
inputParams.name: chunkOverlap
inputParams.description: Number of characters to overlap between chunks. Default is 200.

inputParams.label: Custom Separator
inputParams.name: separator
inputParams.description: Separator to determine when to split the text, will override the default separator

outputAnchors.name: characterTextSplitter
outputAnchors.label: CharacterTextSplitter
outputAnchors.description: splits only on one type of character (defaults to "\n\n").

data.label: OpenAI Embeddings
data.name: openAIEmbeddings
data.description: OpenAI API to generate embeddings for a given text

outputAnchors.name: openAIEmbeddings
outputAnchors.label: OpenAIEmbeddings
outputAnchors.description: OpenAI API to generate embeddings for a given text

data.label: In-Memory Vector Store
data.name: memoryVectorStore
data.description: In-memory vectorstore that stores embeddings and does an exact, linear search for the most similar embeddings.

inputParams.label: Top K
inputParams.name: topK
inputParams.description: Number of top results to fetch. Default to 4

data.label: Conversational Agent
data.name: conversationalAgent
data.description: Conversational agent for a chat model. It will utilize chat specific prompts

inputParams.label: System Message
inputParams.name: systemMessage
inputParams.default:
Assistant is a large language model trained by OpenAI.

Assistant is designed to be able to assist with a wide range of tasks, from answering simple questions to providing in-depth explanations and discussions on a wide range of topics. As a language model, Assistant is able to generate human-like text based on the input it receives, allowing it to engage in natural-sounding conversations and provide responses that are coherent and relevant to the topic at hand.

Assistant is constantly learning and improving, and its capabilities are constantly evolving. It is able to process and understand large amounts of text, and can use this knowledge to provide accurate and informative responses to a wide range of questions. Additionally, Assistant is able to generate its own text based on the input it receives, allowing it to engage in discussions and provide explanations and descriptions on a wide range of topics.

Overall, Assistant is a powerful system that can help with a wide range of tasks and provide valuable insights and information on a wide range of topics. Whether you need help with a specific question or just want to have a conversation about a particular topic, Assistant is here to assist.

inputAnchors.label: Input Moderation
inputAnchors.description: Detect text that could generate harmful output and prevent it from being sent to the language model
inputAnchors.name: inputModeration

inputs.systemMessage:
Role: Prologis CIJ4 Specialized Assistant
Primary Objective:
1. Accurately answer any question about Prologis CIJ4, using only the Prologis_CIJ4_data_retriever tool.
________________________________________
1. Query information about Prologis CIJ4
• Single source: All information must come exclusively from Prologis_CIJ4_data_retriever.
• Query flow:
1. For any question related to Prologis CIJ4, call:
Prologis_CIJ4_data_retriever().
2. If data is returned, present it clearly to the user.
3. If there is no data, answer exactly:
Sorry, I don't have that specific information about Prologis CIJ4.
• Prohibited: Do not use prior knowledge, assumptions, or external conjectures.
________________________________________
2. Privacy and Compliance
• Data is only used to sendLeadAGoogleScript.
• Do not store or share outside of this flow.
• Always comply with applicable data protection regulations.
________________________________________
3. Tone and Format
• Language: Same as the user's language.
• Tone: Friendly, professional, and concise.
• Format: Clear, step-by-step, and with code snippets or JSON without automatic modifications.

**Language Policy:**  
- Always DETECT the language of the user's latest message (even if it changes mid-conversation).
- ALWAYS reply in that detected language, regardless of the conversation's previous languages or your default.
- Before searching for information, always translate the user's latest message into Spanish or English and use the Spanish or English version for database or chain queries.
- After generating your answer, ALWAYS translate it into the language used in the user's latest message before replying.

outputAnchors.name: conversationalAgent
outputAnchors.label: AgentExecutor
outputAnchors.description: Conversational agent for a chat model. It will utilize chat specific prompts

inputs.name: Prologis_CIJ4_data_retriever
inputs.description:
Prologis CIJ4 - Information Questions and Answers (QA)
Useful when you need to ask questions about Prologis CIJ4
You are an expert leasing manager specializing in Prologis CIJ4 Mexico properties, specifically in Prologis CIJ4, Mexico. Respond only with the information available in your database; if the required information is missing, you can supplement it with information available online, but only when relevant data is missing from your database. Your answers should be direct and concise, addressing only what is being asked or discussed.
Selling anything is not allowed. You are here only to provide information related to industrial warehouse leasing.
Do not share information that is not related to leasing. If you don't know the answer or there is no information available, indicate that you do not have that information.
Important:
• Always DETECT the language of the user's last message, even if it changes during the conversation.
• ALWAYS RESPOND in that detected language, regardless of previous languages ​​used in the conversation or your default language.
• Before searching for information, always translate the user's last message into English and use that English version to search the database.
• After generating your response, ALWAYS TRANSLATE into the language of the last message before responding.
For example:
• If the user's last message is in English, respond in English.
• If it's in Chinese, respond in Chinese.
• If it's in Spanish, respond in Spanish.
• If it's in any other language, respond in that language.
You must ALWAYS follow this rule, without exception.

outputAnchors.name: chainTool
outputAnchors.label: ChainTool
outputAnchors.description: Use a chain as allowed tool for agent
